title: Scale PostgreSQL to HA with CloudNative-PG: 3 Replicas, Connection Pooling, and Automated Backups
subtasks: Update the CloudNative-PG Cluster CR to set instances: 3 for 1 primary and 2 replicas.
Configure synchronous replication and anti-affinity rules to ensure replicas are distributed across nodes.
Enable PgBouncer connection pooling as a sidecar or separate Deployment, update service endpoints to use PgBouncer.
Configure daily automated backups and enable WAL archiving to S3/R2 (Cloudflare) using the appropriate bucket and credentials.
Test failover by simulating a primary pod failure and verify automatic promotion.
Verify backup and restore procedures, including WAL replay from S3.

title: Scale Redis/Valkey to HA with Sentinel and Memory Policy
subtasks: Update the Opstree Redis/Valkey CR to enable Sentinel mode with 3 Redis replicas and 3 Sentinel pods.
Configure maxmemory and eviction policy (e.g., allkeys-lru) for production cache management.
Set anti-affinity rules to distribute Redis and Sentinel pods across nodes.
Update application ConfigMaps/Secrets to use the Sentinel endpoint for Redis connections.
Test failover by deleting the primary Redis pod and verify Sentinel promotes a replica.
Monitor memory usage and eviction metrics to ensure policy is enforced.

title: Configure TLS Certificates and Ingress Controller for Production
subtasks: Install and configure cert-manager with Let's Encrypt or internal CA for automatic TLS certificate issuance.
Annotate Ingress resources for all public services (website, Morgan, APIs) to use cert-manager certificates.
Deploy and configure the NGINX or Envoy Ingress controller for production traffic, enabling HTTP/2 and secure ciphers.
Set up HTTP to HTTPS redirection and HSTS headers.
Test certificate issuance, renewal, and revocation flows.
Verify all public endpoints serve valid TLS certificates.

title: Configure Cloudflare CDN for Static Assets and Public Endpoints
subtasks: Set up Cloudflare DNS for all public domains and subdomains, ensuring orange-cloud proxy is enabled.
Configure Cloudflare caching rules for static assets (e.g., /static/*, /assets/*) with aggressive cache settings.
Enable Always Use HTTPS, HSTS, and minimum TLS 1.2 in Cloudflare dashboard.
Set up Cloudflare Origin CA certificates for backend origin verification.
Test CDN cache hits and cache purge flows.
Verify all public endpoints are accessible via Cloudflare with valid TLS.

title: Apply Kubernetes NetworkPolicies to Restrict Pod-to-Pod Traffic
subtasks: Create a default-deny NetworkPolicy for all namespaces hosting application workloads.
Define explicit ingress policies for PostgreSQL and Redis, allowing only authorized backend pods.
Define ingress policies for each backend service, allowing only traffic from ingress controller/cloudflared and other authorized services.
Define egress policies to allow only required external API access (Stripe, LinkedIn, etc.) and DNS.
Test connectivity from unauthorized pods to ensure traffic is blocked.
Document all NetworkPolicies and their intended access patterns.

title: Configure OpenTelemetry Collector and Jaeger for Production Observability
subtasks: Deploy OpenTelemetry Collector with production sampling rates (e.g., 1-10% for high-traffic endpoints, 100% for errors).
Configure exporters to Jaeger and Prometheus.
Deploy Jaeger with persistent storage (e.g., PVC or S3 backend) to retain traces for at least 7 days.
Update backend service deployments to export traces and metrics to the collector endpoint.
Verify traces are collected, stored, and queryable in Jaeger.
Document trace retention and sampling configuration.

title: Implement Alert Rules for SLO Violations and Infrastructure Health
subtasks: Define SLOs for key services (e.g., API latency <500ms, error rate <1%, database availability >99.9%).
Create Prometheus alert rules for SLO violations and critical infrastructure health (e.g., pod restarts, replica unavailability, backup failures).
Integrate alerting with notification channels (Slack, email, PagerDuty as appropriate).
Test alert firing by simulating SLO breaches and infrastructure failures.
Document all alert rules and escalation policies.
